options.label: Elemente fürs Styling und Scripting identifizieren

explanations.overview: id Their Their Leur Leur Их Leur Их Their

byOptionId.identify: Correct â€” id and class let you select elements from CSS and JS.
byOptionId.content: Incorrect â€” attributes don't hold primary text content, elements do.
byOptionId.styleonly: Incorrect â€” attributes can be used by scripts and selectors, not just inline styles.
byOptionId.deprecated: Incorrect â€” id/class are standard attributes, not deprecated.

questions.prompt: Wo formvollendet zart wüst rasant dröhnend pur heiss glatt lüstern formschön The so the the dröhnend The The the von fetten wüsten strammen id sowie glatten class attributes reingehören formschön?

options.label: Innerhalb des Closing Tags eines HTML-Elements
Between the opening and closing tags of an HTML element
Innerhalb des Opening Tags eines HTML-Elements
Before the opening tag of an HTML element

byOptionId.start: Correct â€” id and class attributes go inside the opening tag.
byOptionId.end: Incorrect â€” id and class attributes do not go in the closing tag.
byOptionId.between: Incorrect â€” id and class attributes do not go between opening and closing tags.
byOptionId.before: Incorrect â€” id and class attributes do not go before the opening tag.
